summary: Comprehensive testing of GTI Fleet Management System v3.0 role system update completed. Backend: 55/55 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly including new 5-role registration, country search, password visibility toggle, forgot password flow, personalized driver dashboard, and driving metrics page.

new_role_system: Registration with FLEET_MANAGER role (requires country, needs approval)
Registration with FLEET_OFFICER role (requires country, needs approval)
Registration with DRIVER role (requires country, needs approval)
Registration with USER role (requires country, needs approval)
All 5 roles visible in registration dropdown with icons and descriptions
country_selection: Country search filtering works (typing 'Nig' shows Niger, Nigeria)
Country dropdown shows all available countries
password_features: Password visibility toggle on login form works
Password visibility toggle on registration form works
Confirm password field present on registration
forgot_password: Forgot password link visible on login page
personal_dashboard: Personal dashboard loads for approved driver
Personal dashboard shows: total_trips, total_distance_km, pending_requests, approved_requests
Personal dashboard shows: today_checklist_completed, assigned_vehicle, recent_requests
Quick Actions section with Pre-Trip Check, My Logbook, New Request, My Metrics
manager_dashboard: Country filter dropdown visible for Group Manager
Dashboard shows fleet-wide stats: vehicles, drivers, maintenance, costs
Active Alerts and Compliance Overview sections working
sidebar_role_based: Driver/User sees limited menu: My Dashboard, Pre-Trip Check, My Logbook, Driving Metrics, My Requests, My Reports
Manager sees full menu with all fleet management options
User Management visible only to managers
driving_metrics_page: Metric cards: Total Distance, Total Trips, Fuel Efficiency, Fuel Used
Safety Metrics: Speed Violations, Harsh Braking, Harsh Acceleration
role_approval_workflow: Non-Group Manager roles show 'Account Pending Approval' page after registration
Approval message: 'Your account is awaiting approval from the Group Fleet Manager'
authentication: Login with Group Manager credentials (test@gti.com / Test123!)
existing_features: Maintenance requests CRUD and approval workflow
Pre-trip checklist creation and status check

seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for users, vehicles, drivers, tires, vendors, logbook entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new role system features tested and working. 5 roles (GROUP_FLEET_MANAGER, FLEET_MANAGER, FLEET_OFFICER, DRIVER, USER) with proper registration, approval workflow, and role-based dashboards. Country selection has 100+ countries with search. Password visibility toggle and forgot password flow working. Driving Metrics page accessible as separate navigation route. Test credentials: test@gti.com / Test123! (Group Manager), driver1@gti.com / Test123! (Driver).
